description_long: This rifle features a long, angular body with a matte dark green and black finish, accented by metallic silver components. The main receiver is robust and blocky, with a prominent, squared-off barrel extending forward, partially shrouded by a ventilated handguard. The grip is ergonomic and positioned below the receiver, with a trigger guard integrated into the design. The rear of the rifle is slightly elevated, with a raised cheek rest and a metallic rail or handle running along the top. The overall design is modern and tactical, suggesting a weapon intended for urban or military use, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a dark green and black finish, featuring metallic accents and a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the angular barrel, ergonomic grip, and metallic top rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and rear cheek rest.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock area and the alignment of the top rail, with the barrel receding into the distance.

license_info.creator_display_name: I Will Think About My Name Later
